moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 kicks off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins today at the All England Club, running for two weeks.

angles.name: Classic Wimbledon
angles.copy: Strawberries & cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 is officially underway. Who are you backing for glory on the grass this year?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The SW19 buzz is back! Wimbledon has begun, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London. Are you heading down to soak up the atmosphere?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 enters its thrilling knockout phase with Round of 32 matches happening through July 3, followed by the Round of 16.

angles.name: Knockout Drama
angles.copy: It's do or die! The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stages are in full swing. Who's making it through to the next round?

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is gripping the nation as the knockouts deliver non-stop drama. Any upset predictions for the Round of 32?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 takes place this weekend, July 3-5, at the iconic Silverstone Circuit.

angles.name: Race Weekend
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go! The British Grand Prix is at Silverstone this weekend. Who's taking pole position?

angles.name: Silverstone Excitement
angles.copy: The roar of the engines is heading to Silverstone! The British Grand Prix is set for an epic weekend of F1 action, July 3-5.

moments.title: England Men's Cricket vs India IT20 Series
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team faces India in a Vitality IT20 series this week, with matches on July 1 (Durham), July 4 (Manchester), July 7 (Nottingham), and July 9 (Bristol).

angles.name: White-Ball Battle
angles.copy: England vs India in the Vitality IT20 series kicks off this week! Who's ready for some explosive white-ball cricket?

angles.name: Bristol Cricket
angles.copy: Big cricket coming to the Westcountry! England take on India in a Vitality IT20 match at the Seat Unique Stadium in Bristol on July 9th. Get ready!

moments.title: BST Hyde Park continues with huge artists
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park continues into July with Maroon 5 (July 3), Mumford & Sons (July 4), Duran Duran (July 5), and Pitbull (July 10).

angles.name: Hyde Park Lineup
angles.copy: BST Hyde Park is delivering massive acts this week! Maroon 5, Mumford & Sons, Duran Duran, and Pitbull are all set to hit the stage. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Duran Duran Live
angles.copy: Icons alert! Duran Duran are bringing their legendary show to BST Hyde Park this Sunday, July 5th. Get ready for some 80s synth-pop magic!

moments.title: Roundhay Festival Debuts in Leeds
moments.blurb: The brand new Roundhay Festival launches in Leeds this weekend, featuring Pitbull on July 3rd and Lewis Capaldi on July 4th.

angles.name: Leeds Festival Launch
angles.copy: A new festival arrives! Roundhay Festival debuts in Leeds this weekend with Pitbull and Lewis Capaldi headlining. Who's making the trip?

angles.name: Capaldi in Yorkshire
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi is coming to Leeds! Catch him headlining the new Roundhay Festival this Saturday, July 4th. Get your tickets now!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean top UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart (June 26, 2026) sees 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean holding steady at number one.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: It's official! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still at #1 on the UK Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'. What's your favourite track from the Top 40?

angles.name: New Music Monday
angles.copy: Catching up on the latest UK Singles Chart! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean remain at the top. Any new entries you're loving?

moments.title: Love Island UK still dominating screens
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began June 1, is well underway, bringing daily drama from the Mallorca villa to ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Who's still hooked on Love Island UK? The villa drama is heating up as the islanders search for love (and £50k!). What's been your favourite moment so far?

angles.name: Summer Viewing
angles.copy: Love Island UK continues to be the ultimate summer viewing. Are you team 'crack on' or 'mugged off'?

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis!
moments.blurb: American singer and frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, Huey Lewis, turns 76 on July 5th.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! What's your go-to track from Huey Lewis and the News?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating an 80s icon today! Huey Lewis turns 76. From 'The Power of Love' to 'Hip to Be Square', his hits are timeless.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, RZA!
moments.blurb: American rapper, record producer, and de facto leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, RZA, turns 57 on July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Legend
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only RZA! A true legend of hip-hop and the mastermind behind Wu-Tang Clan. What's your favourite RZA-produced track?

angles.name: Hip Hop Master
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 57th Birthday to RZA! The Wu-Tang Clan producer and rapper has shaped generations of music. Drop your favourite Wu-Tang anthem!

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, 50 Cent!
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman, 50 Cent, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on July 6th. What's your favourite track from the G-Unit boss?

angles.name: Hip Hop Star
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent! From 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' to 'Candy Shop', he's delivered countless bangers.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, John Keeble!
moments.blurb: John Keeble, the drummer for the iconic New Wave band Spandau Ballet, turns 67 on July 6th.

angles.name: True Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to John Keeble, the heartbeat of Spandau Ballet! What's your favourite Spandau track that gets you on the dancefloor?

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating an 80s legend today! John Keeble of Spandau Ballet turns 67. From 'True' to 'Gold', their music defined an era.

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday, Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles song featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating a drumming icon! Ringo Starr turns 86 today. His impact on music is immeasurable. Give us your favourite Ringo moment!

moments.title: Happy 72nd Birthday, Debbie Sledge!
moments.blurb: American singer and member of the iconic R&B vocal group Sister Sledge, Debbie Sledge, turns 72 on July 9th.

angles.name: We Are Family
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to Debbie Sledge! The voice behind some of Sister Sledge's biggest hits. What's your favourite Sister Sledge anthem?

angles.name: Disco Diva
angles.copy: Celebrating a true disco diva! Debbie Sledge turns 72. Her vocals on 'We Are Family' and 'Lost in Music' are legendary.

moments.title: Happy 69th Birthday, Marc Almond!
moments.blurb: English singer-songwriter, known for his work with Soft Cell, Marc Almond, turns 69 on July 9th.

angles.name: Tainted Love
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the iconic Marc Almond of Soft Cell! What's your favourite synth-pop classic from him?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating a true pioneer of synth-pop! Marc Almond turns 69 today. His distinctive voice defined the 80s for many.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Jim Kerr!
moments.blurb: Scottish singer and frontman of the rock band Simple Minds, Jim Kerr, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Simple Minds Frontman
angles.copy: Don't you forget about him! Happy 67th Birthday to Jim Kerr, the incredible voice of Simple Minds! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Scottish Rocker
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to Scottish rock icon Jim Kerr! Simple Minds' anthems are still filling stadiums. What's your top pick?

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Courtney Love!
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress, best known as the frontwoman of the band Hole, Courtney Love, turns 62 on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the fearless Courtney Love! Frontwoman of Hole and an undeniable force in rock music. What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating a true 90s icon! Courtney Love turns 62 today. Her raw energy and talent have left an indelible mark on music.

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, Jack White!
moments.blurb: American musician, singer-songwriter, and producer, known for his work with The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, and The Dead Weather, Jack White, turns 51 on July 9th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White! From The White Stripes to his solo work, he's a true guitar hero. What's your favourite Jack White project?

angles.name: Modern Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to Jack White! A modern rock legend whose creativity knows no bounds. What's your favourite riff from him?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays begin across UK
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are starting their summer holidays this week, marking the beginning of the long break for students and families.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are officially here for many across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Summer Fun
angles.copy: Sun's out, school's out! Wishing everyone starting their summer holidays a fantastic break. What's on your summer bucket list?
